data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: An additional layer of security for account protection.
data.technical_spec: Integration of physical security keys and authentication apps.

data.title: TLS Encryption

data.technical_spec: Google Shield and transaction filtering technologies.

data.title: Intrusion Detection System (IDS)
data.description: Continuous monitoring to detect suspicious activities.
